subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Asdaq! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Some time ago thou wast favoured with the verses of the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن اسمی اصدق علیکما بهائی و عنایتی چندی قبل باثار قلم اعلی فائز شدی جناب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action
